summary:
Mitochondrial DNA in humans is exclusively maternally inherited due to the destruction of paternal mitochondria shortly after fertilization. This means mitochondria cannot be inherited by both parents in humans.  

$\boxed{\text{B}}$

agent2 (Round 1 summarized): Mitochondrial DNA in humans is exclusively maternally inherited due to the destruction of paternal mitochondria shortly after fertilization. This means mitochondria cannot be inherited by both parents in humans.  

$\boxed{\text{B}}$. Answer choice: B
